questions: Why are conversions down YoY and what to do?
How should marketers diagnose conversion drops?
qa.answer: Macro shifts (privacy, auction changes, seasonality), creative fatigue, UX friction, and tracking changes can depress conversions. Diagnose by funnel stage, cohort, channel, and technical issues.
implication: Audit tracking, attribution, and consent; fix data loss first.
Revamp creative and offers; improve speed and UX.
Rebalance budgets to efficient channels; validate with tests.
